description: Groundwork dependency updates via the self-hosted Renovate runner in jasondockery/renovate-config (executor decision: roost tools/github/README.md → Self-hosted Renovate migration). The surfaces here are GitHub Actions SHA pins and the Dockerfile base image digest. Operational notes live in PLAYBOOK.md.

Shared owner policy (weekly schedule, 5-day cooldown, PR limits, rebase behavior, labels, immediate automerged security PRs) comes from the github>jasondockery/renovate-config preset — defined once, consumed here. Only groundwork-specific rules stay local; the wider non-major group below includes digest and pin updates because this repo's surfaces are SHA pins, not semver ranges.
